description_long: This is a large, wooden dam-like structure featuring a deep, curved basin flanked by high vertical walls. The main body is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with a smooth, continuous surface forming the interior curve. Metal railings run along the top edges for safety, and a prominent stairway leads up to a raised platform on one side. The structure includes a rectangular opening in the central wall, possibly for access or water flow. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible support beams and a functional, industrial appearance.
description: A large, light-wood dam structure with a deep curved basin, metal railings, and a raised platform with stairs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dam, the curved basin, and the central rectangular opening.
description_view_1: Frontal view into the deep curved basin, highlighting the smooth wooden surface and perimeter railings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back wall, the rectangular opening, and the stairway structure on the right.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the raised platform, stairway, and the depth of the curved basin.
